commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bundled-plugin PI middleware contracts for streaming LLM calls and tool calls, wires them into the PI runner/tool path, exposes SDK types/API methods, and adds focused tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection shows the likely failure path: loader can preserve a global gateway registry while setting a different active registry, and the new middleware helpers read the global registry.
